candidate: Opt-in HIP graph replay for the fixed-pointer route-batched proposer expert subgraph
decision_reason: The graph replay stayed exact but did not improve the metric it should directly affect. Same-session graph-on versus graph-off showed identical visible/accepted density and a slightly better total wall from verifier noise, while proposal/update regressed from 1.2492 to 1.2550 ms/cycle. Because the candidate only changes proposer selected-expert dispatch, the verifier-side wall movement is not retained evidence.

workload.suite: llama.cpp mtp-bench prompt suite, raw prompt render
workload.current_stack: direct-gate full attention, route-batched proposer expert, fused proposer router, retained reduced-DAG verifier defaults

commands.unit_tests: python3 -m py_compile hipengine/speculative/mtp_native.py tests/test_mtp_input_fusion_kernel.py && PYTHONPATH=. pytest -q tests/test_mtp_input_fusion_kernel.py -q
commands.quicksort_smoke_candidate: PROMPT_TOKENS=$(cat /tmp/quicksort-prompt-tokens.txt); HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=32768 HIPENGINE_MTP_PROPOSER_ROUTE_BATCHED_EXPERT_GRAPH=1 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 1800 python3 scripts/mtp_chain_e2e_smoke.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --prompt-tokens "$PROMPT_TOKENS" --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budget 3 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --json /tmp/hipengine-mtp-route-expert-graph-smoke-20260612.json
commands.suite_candidate: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=32768 HIPENGINE_MTP_PROPOSER_ROUTE_BATCHED_EXPERT_GRAPH=1 HIPENGINE_QWEN35_DECODE_BATCHED_DIRECT_GATE=1 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 7200 python3 scripts/mtp_prompt_suite_economics.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budgets 3 --runs 1 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --hip-arch gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --raw-root /tmp/hipengine-mtp-route-expert-graph-on-9prompt-d32 --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-route-expert-graph-on-9prompt-d32.json
commands.suite_control: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=32768 HIPENGINE_QWEN35_DECODE_BATCHED_DIRECT_GATE=1 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 7200 python3 scripts/mtp_prompt_suite_economics.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budgets 3 --runs 1 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --hip-arch gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --raw-root /tmp/hipengine-mtp-route-expert-graph-off-control-9prompt-d32 --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-route-expert-graph-off-control-9prompt-d32.json

prototype_scope: The removed prototype captured only the four fixed-pointer route-batched selected-expert proposer kernels after router top-k and before shared expert work. It did not capture dynamic K/V writes, attention context length, shared expert, LM-head, or verifier work.
